02 — Where You're Losing Them
The 3 Critical Call Windows
70% of missed calls happen in these three windows — and none of them are random.
8:00 – 10:00 AM
Morning Rush
Customers call before heading to work. Your team is doing opening tasks — prep, setup, getting the day started. The phone is the last priority.
~30% of daily misses
12:00 – 1:30 PM
Lunch Window
Staff on break. New customers call on their lunch break — the only free window in their day. One person covering everything.
~25% of daily misses
5:00 PM – 8:59 AM
After Hours
Every call outside business hours goes straight to voicemail. Most callers don't leave a message — they call the next business on Google.
~45% of daily misses
03 — What Changes
Before vs. After AI Receptionist
Real outcomes from plugging the missed call gap with an AI voice system.
Without AI
3–8 missed calls/day on average
Customers sent to voicemail after hours
2–4 new customers/month from inbound calls
No-show rate: 15–25%
Callbacks returned next day (or not at all)
Google reviews requested inconsistently
With AI Receptionist
0 missed calls — all overflow handled 24/7
After-hours calls booked directly to calendar
8–14 new customers/month from same call volume
No-show rate: 8–12% (SMS reminders active)
Callbacks notified to staff in real time
Review request sent automatically post-appointment
04 — The Fix
5 Automations That Pay for Themselves
Each of these runs automatically, once set up. No ongoing effort required.
1
AI Voice Receptionist
Handles overflow and after-hours calls. Books appointments directly into your calendar. Answers FAQs. Routes urgent calls immediately.
Core Fix
2
SMS Appointment Reminders
Automated texts sent 24 hours and 2 hours before each appointment. Reduces no-shows by 30–40% in the first month.
-35% No-Shows
3
Missed Call Re-engagement
When a call is missed, the customer receives an SMS within 30 minutes offering to book online or get a callback. Recaptures 40–60% of missed callers.
~50% Recapture
4
Post-Appointment Review Request
24 hours after each appointment, a personalized SMS is sent asking happy customers for a Google review. Compounds your online reputation automatically.
More Reviews
5
Callback Request Routing
Customers can request a callback at any time. Your team receives an instant notification with the caller's name, number, and reason — no missed opportunities.
Zero Dropped Leads
